name: Stir-Fry Cherry Tomatoes & Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the butter and olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and shallots (or scallions); sauté for 2 to 3 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add the tomatoes and herbs, shaking the pan continuously for 2 to 3 minutes, until heated through.
4. Do not over-cook the vegetables.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve immediately.
